_meta.note: SYNTHETIC demo data for the AI Saheli leadership demo. Facility names, addresses, and phone numbers are illustrative and NOT live. In production, geo_locator resolves facilities via the Poshan Tracker (AWC), Mission Shakti GIS / Sakhi OSC directory (OSC), and the CPMS / Mission Vatsalya directory (DCPU, CWC).
